body: ## [1.10.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.10.0...v1.10.1) (2016-12-23) ### Bug Fixes * **url:** default param ([7a18e1c](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/7a18e1c)) ### Features * **url:** add a beta updateOnEveryKeystroke option (#1779) ([63f73fe](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/63f73fe))
